meta.title: CLI Coding Agent Harnesses
meta.description: Comprehensive dataset of terminal-based AI coding agents

agents.name: Gemini CLI
agents.description: Google's open-source terminal coding agent with the most generous free tier and largest context window.
agents.keyDifferentiator: 1M token context window, 1000 free requests/day with just a Google login, highest-starred CLI agent repo.

pricing.paidTier: Gemini Code Assist Standard/Enterprise or pay-per-token via API

agents.name: Claude Code
agents.description: Anthropic's terminal-native coding agent, originator of the agentic CLI paradigm with the deepest context-engineering capabilities.
agents.keyDifferentiator: Created MCP standard, richest permission model, CLAUDE.md ecosystem, sub-agent orchestration, Jupyter notebook editing.

pricing.paidTier: Pro $20/mo, Max $100-200/mo, or API pay-per-token (~$6/dev/day average)

features.contextStrategy: Compaction at ~75-95% usage, background summarization, sub-agent context isolation

agents.name: Codex CLI
agents.description: OpenAI's Rust-native open-source terminal coding agent with pluggable model providers and OS-level sandboxing.
agents.keyDifferentiator: Written in Rust for performance, supports both cloud and local LLMs, native context compaction trained into the model.

pricing.freeTier: Limited free tier in ChatGPT Free/Go
pricing.paidTier: ChatGPT Plus $20/mo (45-225 messages/5hr), Pro $200/mo, or API pay-per-token

models.localProvider: Ollama, LM Studio, MLX, any OpenAI-compatible

features.contextStrategy: Model-native context compaction across millions of tokens

agents.name: Qwen Code
agents.description: Alibaba's CLI agent co-evolved with the open-weight Qwen3-Coder model, forked from Gemini CLI.
agents.keyDifferentiator: Ships in lockstep with its own open-weight model (Qwen3-Coder), 2000 free daily requests, Docker sandboxing out of the box.

pricing.paidTier: BYO API key, commercial Qwen API ~$0.0004-$0.0064/1K tokens

agents.name: Copilot CLI
agents.description: GitHub's terminal agent deeply integrated with the GitHub ecosystem (issues, PRs, Actions, coding agent).
agents.keyDifferentiator: Delegate terminal work to the same cloud agent that powers github.com, cross-agent memory system.

agents.name: Kimi CLI
agents.description: Moonshot AI's CLI agent powered by Kimi K2.5 with file editing, shell execution, web search, and autonomous planning.
agents.keyDifferentiator: First-party CLI from a major Chinese AI lab, supports ACP protocol, long-context refactoring.

agents.name: Junie CLI
agents.description: JetBrains' first-party CLI coding agent with deep IDE integration, CI/CD support, and LLM-agnostic design.
agents.keyDifferentiator: Deep JetBrains IDE integration, GitHub Actions/GitLab CI native, reads AGENTS.md and .junie/guidelines.md.

agents.name: Mistral Vibe
agents.description: Mistral AI's first-party CLI coding agent powered by Devstral 2 with custom subagents and slash-command skills.
agents.keyDifferentiator: Only first-party CLI agent from a European AI lab, custom subagents and clarification prompts.

agents.name: Amazon Q CLI
agents.description: AWS's CLI agent, now deprecated and rebranded as Kiro CLI (closed-source). Deep AWS service integration.
agents.keyDifferentiator: Spec-driven development, deep AWS integration, transitioned from open-source to managed Kiro product.

agents.name: OpenHands
agents.description: Full-stack AI development platform with web GUI, CLI, TUI, and SDK modes, backed by $18.8M Series A.
agents.keyDifferentiator: Largest open-source coding agent project, Docker sandboxing per session, scales to 1000s of parallel agents.

pricing.freeTier: Free self-hosted, $10 cloud credit on signup

features.contextStrategy: Full repo clone into sandbox, microagent context injection

agents.name: Open Interpreter
agents.description: The original ChatGPT that runs code locally -- a model-agnostic natural language interface that executes Python, JS, and shell on your machine.
agents.keyDifferentiator: Broadest scope -- runs any code, not just file edits. Pioneered the local code execution paradigm.

agents.name: Cline CLI
agents.description: Autonomous coding agent (originally IDE-only) with a recently launched standalone CLI mode supporting headless and parallel execution.
agents.keyDifferentiator: Granular per-action auto-approve, checkpoint rollback system, browser automation via Computer Use, MCP server creation.

agents.name: Aider
agents.description: The most mature open-source CLI pair programmer with deep git integration, tree-sitter repo map, and architect mode.
agents.keyDifferentiator: Pioneered terminal AI coding, auto-commits every change, tree-sitter repo map for context, architect mode splits reasoning from editing.

features.contextStrategy: Tree-sitter repo map with graph ranking, selective file loading

agents.name: Continue CLI
agents.description: Open-source modular agent with TUI for interactive coding and headless mode for background/CI agents.
agents.keyDifferentiator: Only major agent with both JetBrains and CLI support, headless mode for CI/CD, @docs indexing, model role separation.

features.contextStrategy: @ context providers, embeddings-based codebase search, doc indexing

agents.name: Goose
agents.description: Block's fully extensible MCP-native agent that goes beyond code to install, execute, edit, and test.
agents.keyDifferentiator: Built from the ground up on MCP, Linux Foundation / AAIF co-founding project, model-agnostic, Recipes for async automation.

agents.name: Crush
agents.description: Charmbracelet's glamorous terminal coding agent with LSP integration, built on Bubble Tea.
agents.keyDifferentiator: Beautiful TUI from the team behind Bubble Tea/Lip Gloss, LSP integration, Agent Skills open standard, MCP support, 18+ built-in tools.

agents.name: SWE-agent
agents.description: Research-grade autonomous agent from Princeton NLP purpose-built for solving GitHub issues, with a novel Agent-Computer Interface.
agents.keyDifferentiator: ACI design (purpose-built agent-computer interfaces), NeurIPS 2024 paper, mini-swe-agent matches full performance in ~100 lines.

features.contextStrategy: Agent-Computer Interface with structured navigation commands

agents.name: Plandex
agents.description: CLI agent designed for large multi-file changes with a diff sandbox, version control, and git-like branching for plans.
agents.keyDifferentiator: All changes held in a virtual sandbox until approved, git-like branching for plans, 2M effective token context.

features.contextStrategy: 2M effective token context via tree-sitter maps

agents.name: Kilo Code CLI
agents.description: Model-agnostic CLI agent supporting 500+ models at zero markup -- the most vendor-neutral option.
agents.keyDifferentiator: 500+ models via OpenRouter, zero markup on API costs, MCP Server Marketplace, Cline fork that diverged significantly.

supported: 500+ models via OpenRouter, Claude, GPT-5, Gemini 3 Pro, Ollama

agents.name: Claude Engineer
agents.description: Interactive CLI leveraging Claude for software development with self-expanding tool creation capabilities.
agents.keyDifferentiator: Self-expanding tools -- the agent can create new tools for itself during a session.

agents.name: Trae Agent
agents.description: ByteDance's open-source LLM-based agent for software engineering tasks, state-of-the-art on SWE-bench Verified.
agents.keyDifferentiator: SOTA SWE-bench results from a major tech company, open-source under MIT.

agents.name: OpenCode
agents.description: The free, open-source alternative to Claude Code with 650K monthly users and 75+ provider support.
agents.keyDifferentiator: Highest-starred CLI agent overall, 75+ providers, native MCP, LSP support out of the box, skills system compatible with Claude Code.

agents.name: AIChat
agents.description: All-in-one Rust-based LLM CLI tool with shell assistant, chat REPL, RAG, AI tools, and agents supporting 20+ providers.
agents.keyDifferentiator: Swiss Army knife of CLI LLM tools -- chat, RAG, agents, function calling in one fast Rust binary.

agents.name: DeepAgents
agents.description: LangChain's agent harness with planning, filesystem tools, subagent spawning, and persistent memory.
agents.keyDifferentiator: Built on LangGraph, scores on par with Claude Code on Terminal Bench, subagent spawning.

agents.name: Pi
agents.description: Deliberately minimal coding agent with only 4 tools (Read, Write, Edit, Bash) and hot-reloading TypeScript self-extension.
agents.keyDifferentiator: Radical minimalism -- 4 tools, shortest system prompt, agent extends itself via TypeScript modules at runtime, tree-based session branching.

features.contextStrategy: Minimal context, self-extending capabilities, tree-based session branching

agents.name: Roo Code CLI
agents.install: VS Code extension (CLI via cloud agents)
agents.description: Multi-agent orchestrator with Boomerang mode, custom personas, and cloud agents accessible via Slack/GitHub/web.
agents.keyDifferentiator: Multi-agent orchestration (Boomerang), most granular auto-approve system (8 categories), custom modes with file regex restrictions.

features.contextStrategy: Token budgeting (70/20/10 split), intelligent condensing, sliding window

agents.name: ForgeCode
agents.description: Rust-based CLI pair programmer supporting 300+ models with zero-config setup.
agents.keyDifferentiator: Rust performance, 300+ model support, zero configuration needed to start.

agents.name: Kode CLI
agents.description: Multi-model collaboration CLI with intelligent sub-agent delegation and AGENTS.md standard support.
agents.keyDifferentiator: Multi-model collaboration via @ mentions, sub-agent delegation, Claude Code compatible (.claude dirs).

agents.name: gptme
agents.description: One of the first agent CLIs (Spring 2023), still actively developed with local tools for code, terminal, web browsing, and vision.
agents.keyDifferentiator: Pioneer of the CLI agent space (2023), plugin system, MCP support, web browsing, managed service at gptme.ai.

agents.name: AutoCodeRover
agents.description: Project-structure-aware autonomous software engineer resolving 46.2% of SWE-bench at under $0.70 per task.
agents.keyDifferentiator: Cheapest per-task cost on SWE-bench, project-structure-aware navigation.

agents.name: Codebuff
agents.description: Multi-agent CLI with specialized agents (File Picker, Planner, Editor, Reviewer) coordinating across your codebase.
agents.keyDifferentiator: Multi-agent architecture with specialized roles, claims 61% vs Claude Code's 53% on internal evals.

features.contextStrategy: Multi-agent context splitting across specialized agents

agents.name: Codel
agents.description: Fully autonomous AI agent performing tasks using terminal, browser, and editor within a sandboxed Docker environment.
agents.keyDifferentiator: Built-in Docker sandboxing with browser automation for every task.

agents.name: Grok CLI
agents.description: Community-built CLI agent bringing xAI's Grok to the terminal with file editing and bash integration.
agents.keyDifferentiator: The terminal interface for Grok/xAI models, multi-model support.

agents.name: Agentless
agents.description: An agentless approach to solving software development problems without a persistent agent loop.
agents.keyDifferentiator: No persistent agent -- uses localization then repair in two phases. Simpler, cheaper, competitive results.

orchestrators.name: Claude Squad
orchestrators.description: Manages multiple CLI agents in parallel via tmux sessions with git worktrees.

orchestrators.name: Toad
orchestrators.description: Universal TUI for agentic coding by Will McGugan (creator of Rich/Textual), wraps multiple agents via ACP.

orchestrators.name: Superset
orchestrators.description: Terminal command center for orchestrating a team of CLI coding agents with git worktree isolation.

orchestrators.name: Emdash
orchestrators.description: YC W26 agentic dev environment for running 15+ CLI agents in parallel with Linear/GitHub/Jira integration.

closedSource.name: Warp
closedSource.description: Full terminal replacement rebuilt in Rust with integrated multi-agent orchestration.
closedSource.keyDifferentiator: The only full terminal emulator with built-in coding agents, reads WARP.md + CLAUDE.md + AGENTS.md + GEMINI.md.

closedSource.name: Amp
closedSource.description: Sourcegraph's multi-model CLI agent using different frontier models per subtask.
closedSource.keyDifferentiator: Uses Claude Opus 4.5, GPT-5.2, Gemini 3 Pro for different subtasks (code, search, review). Librarian subagent searches public + private GitHub repos.
